settings.title: Find out more!
settings.text: Be the first one to know when we open!

custom_css: .maintenance-wrapper {text-align: center; border: 1px solid #ddd; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 30px; border-radius: 15px; margin: auto !important; background: #f9f9f9;}
.maintenance-wrapper img {max-width: 230px !important; display: block; width: 100%; margin: 0 auto;}
